title: Personal & Business Loans
content: If you are looking for an unsecured business or personal loan, you have come to the right place. Chola Consumer and Small Enterprise Loans (CSEL) presents you a wide range of loan products without asking for a collateral security for your loan. Chola's business and personal loans support budding entrepreneurs and aspiring professionals to achieve their goals

subsections.title: Our Loan Offerings
subsections.content: Personal Loans Salaried Employees Professional Loans Self-Employed Professionals Business Loans Proprietorship, Partnership & Private Limited Companies.

title: Features & Benefits
content: Collateral-free personal, business & professional loans Instant loan processing Convenient loan repayment options Presence in 800+ locations across the country Paperless digital process Attractive interest rates

subsections.title: Quick Financial Support
subsections.content: Personal & Business Loans EMI Calculator Apply for Personal & Business Loans

subsections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
subsections.content: What is CSEL Loan? Consumer & Small Enterprise Loans (CSEL) is a division of Chola that offers collateral-free Personal, Professional and Business loans.  Who can benefit from CSEL? Salaried Individuals, Self-employed Professionals and Business Owners.  What is the interest rate? Our interest rates are competitive as per market standards.  What is the maximum loan amount for CSEL? We offer unsecured loans up to Rs. 35 Lakh.  What is the maximum tenure? The maximum tenure is 60 months.  Is external guarantor needed to get a loan? No external guarantor is required.  What is the expected time frame for loan disbursal? Our quick and easy process guarantees loan disbursal within 24 to 48 hours of approval.  Which professionals can avail CSEL loan? + Doctors (MBBS, BMS and above) + Chartered Accountants  Is collateral required to avail a loan? No collateral is required to avail Consumer and Small Enterprise Loans.  What are the documents required to avail a loan? • Proof of identity • Address proof • Proof of income • Proof of business (applicable only for self-employed)  Why should I choose Chola CSEL Loans? • Hassle-free unsecured loans • Guarantee of a trusted lender • Attractive interest rates • Excellent customer service  How to apply for a loan? - Apply online through our website www.cholamandalam.com (or) - Visit your nearest Cholamandalam Finance branch to apply offline.  How do I get my loan-related queries resolved? Call our customer grievance redressal toll-free number 1800-102-4565.  What are the penal charges for my Chola/Samsung Consumer Durable Loan? | Fee Type | Till 7th Feb, 2024\ | Till 5th Aug, 2024\ | W.e.f 6th Aug, 2024\ | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Penalty Charges (EMI Late Payment Charges) | Rs. 450/- | Rs. 590/- | Rs. 649/- | \Effective date of bounce/ delayed payments Only penalty charges will be levied once a month for all defaulted customers Customers can contact the Chola Finance Helpline 1800 102 4565 or samsungcare@chola.murugappa.com for any queries.

content: Gold Loan Car Loans Two Wheeler Loans Consumer & Small Enterprise Loans Commercial Vehicle Loans Loan Against Property Construction Equipment Loans Tractor & Farm Equipment Loans Three Wheeler Loans SME Loans Secured Business Loan Loan Against Securities

subsections.title: What is CSEL Loan?
subsections.content: Consumer & Small Enterprise Loans (CSEL) is a division of Chola that offers collateral-free Personal, Professional and Business loans.

subsections.title: Who can benefit from CSEL?
subsections.content: Salaried Individuals, Self-employed Professionals and Business Owners.

subsections.title: What is the interest rate?
subsections.content: Our interest rates are competitive as per market standards.

subsections.title: What is the maximum loan amount for CSEL?
subsections.content: We offer unsecured loans up to Rs. 35 Lakh.

subsections.title: Is external guarantor needed to get a loan?
What is the expected time frame for loan disbursal?
subsections.content: Our quick and easy process guarantees loan disbursal within 24 to 48 hours of approval.

subsections.title: Which professionals can avail CSEL loan?
subsections.content: + Doctors (MBBS, BMS and above) + Chartered Accountants

subsections.title: Is collateral required to avail a loan?
subsections.content: No collateral is required to avail Consumer and Small Enterprise Loans.

subsections.title: What are the documents required to avail a loan?
subsections.content: • Proof of identity • Address proof • Proof of income • Proof of business (applicable only for self-employed)

subsections.title: Why should I choose Chola CSEL Loans?
subsections.content: • Hassle-free unsecured loans • Guarantee of a trusted lender • Attractive interest rates • Excellent customer service

subsections.title: How to apply for a loan?
subsections.content: - Apply online through our website www.cholamandalam.com (or) - Visit your nearest Cholamandalam Finance branch to apply offline.

subsections.title: How do I get my loan-related queries resolved?
subsections.content: Call our customer grievance redressal toll-free number 1800-102-4565.
